title: URAファイナルズ準決勝の後に

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That was such an excellent race! Just watching had my adrenaline pumping!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And now, next up is none other than—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That grandest of stages, where the
hopes of the fans fuel everyone onward... to the
very top.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Please do your best to seize that glory!
